title: platostoma kerrii
intro: Platostoma kerrii is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the 'Thai Basil'. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Platostoma kerrii can be prepared in various forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
